description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a single stage called run-tests. Add a test-master job that runs in the run-tests stage, uses the microsoft/dotnet:2.1-sdk Docker image, is limited to the master branch, and executes the command `dotnet test Source/MemExchange.Server/MemExchange.Tests/MemExchange.Tests.csproj`. Tag the job to run on Docker runners.
